mapper.select:
SELECT t1.* FROM fin_month_record t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT MR_BOOK_ID, MAX(MR_YEAR * 100 + MR_MONTH) AS max_ym FROM fin_month_record WHERE MR_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY MR_BOOK_ID) t2 ON t1.MR_BOOK_ID = t2.MR_BOOK_ID AND (t1.MR_YEAR * 100 + t1.MR_MONTH) = t2.max_ym WHERE t1.MR_IS_DELETED = 0 AND t1.MR_BOOK_ID IN
#{bookId}
